name: ghostify
description: Privacy controls for Instagram, Facebook, and Messenger.

scripts.test: npm run build && node test/messenger-send-stability.test.js && npm run test:validator && npm run test:package
scripts.verify:dist: git diff --exit-code -- dist/background.js dist/js/content.js dist/js/ghost.js dist/js/messenger_patch.js
scripts.ci: npm test && npm run validate:extension && npm run verify:dist && npm run audit:high
